additionalDescription: The dataset contains 15,372 curated bird-event annotations at the taxonomic-group level, of which 6,702 include species-level determinations
description: PteroSet is a curated dataset of strongly annotated Neotropical bird vocalizations recorded in Puerto Asís (Putumayo) and Pivijay (Magdalena), Colombia. PteroSet serves as a realistic benchmark that highlights key characteristics of tropical soundscapes, including acoustic co-occurrence and domain shift across recording sites
name: PteroSet
title: PteroSet: A strongly annotated passive acoustic dataset for tropical bird monitoring
